'''Steve Hall''' (born 10 July 1979 in [[St Helens, Merseyside]]) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer.

Hall's position of choice is on the {{rlp|wg}}. He played for the [[London Broncos#1994–2005: Broncos and Super League|London Broncos]] and [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] in the [[Super League]] and also French club the [[Saint-Gaudens Bears]].<ref>{{cite web | archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20040919220616/http://iccheshireonline.icnetwork.co.uk/0200sport/rugbyleague/tm_objectid=14500637&method=full&siteid=50020&headline=vikings-close-in-super-league-name_page.html | archivedate=19 September 2004 | url=http://iccheshireonline.icnetwork.co.uk/0200sport/rugbyleague/tm_objectid=14500637&method=full&siteid=50020&headline=vikings-close-in-super-league-name_page.html | title=Vikings close in super league | first=Ian | last=Cheveau | date=5 August 2004 | publisher=icCheshireOnline | accessdate=2 September 2020 }}</ref>

Hall played for [[St Helens R.F.C.|St. Helens]] on the wing in their [[2000 Super League Grand Final]] victory over [[Wigan Warriors]]

As of 2012, Hall is a keen cyclist and runs his family-owed second-hand car dealership with his parents and brother in his hometown of St. Helens.
